## Summary

A brief description of the feature.

## Use Case

What problem does this solve? How would you use it?

## Proposed Solution

How should it work? Include API sketches, markup examples, or mockups if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

Are there existing workarounds or alternative approaches?
